rule.statement: helmet() is the FIRST app.use() after the body parser; before any route.
rule.rationale: Security headers must apply to every response; ordering misses break the guarantee.

rule.statement: Every public route is behind express-rate-limit (or upstream WAF) at the door; bursts not allowed to hit the app.
rule.rationale: Without rate-limit, a single misbehaved client can OOM the process.

rule.statement: One error middleware (signature `(err, req, res, next)`) handles all errors; route handlers `next(err)` instead of `res.status(500)...`.
rule.rationale: Centralised mapping ensures consistent error shape and avoids leaking stack traces.

rule.statement: Server listens to SIGINT + SIGTERM; on signal: stop accepting, drain in-flight (timeout 30s), close DB pool, exit.
rule.rationale: Without graceful shutdown, container kill drops in-flight requests; users see 502.

rule.statement: Logging uses pino + pino-http; morgan / winston are forbidden in new services.

rationale.source: pino docs; pino vs winston benchmark

rule.rationale: pino is JSON-structured, fastest, integrates with k8s log collectors out-of-the-box.
